contexts.context: CG: Shouldn’t we have <mark>drop-while</mark> as well? All the languages I know of…
…I know of that have take-while also have <mark>drop-while</mark>
…: Could we have an example of implementing a <mark>drop-while</mark>? Didn’t we have example somewhere?
…at least add an example of how to implement <mark>drop-while</mark> in the section on take-while?
…that many languages have functions take-while() and <mark>drop-while</mark>() that do more or less the same thing…
…see any particular problems with take-while() and <mark>drop-while</mark>() except that they don’t immediately suggest ot me…
…Other languages have imperative sounding functions “take-while” and <mark>“drop-while”</mark>…
…four functions and maybe deal with take-while and <mark>drop-while</mark>
